welcome.heading: Welcome, {{name}}!
welcome.body: Thanks for signing up. Please confirm your email address to activate your account.

resetPassword.subject: Reset your password
resetPassword.heading: Reset your password
resetPassword.body: Hi {{name}}, we received a request to reset your password. This link expires in {{minutes}} minutes. If you didn't request it, you can ignore this email.
